  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day
  • View page source

Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm Edit
Description
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput measures the total amount of feedstock processed in a facility over a 24-hour period
  • expressed in tons per day
  • Average processing rate of material over the measurement period
  • typically normalized to daily capacity
Objective
  • The objective of this KPI is to assess the efficiency and productivity of feedstock processing operations
  • enabling better resource management and operational planning
  • Maximize utilization while respecting equipment and constraint limits
Formula

The throughput is calculated by dividing the total feedstock processed in tons by the number of hours the facility was operational, then multiplying by 24 to annualize the figure to a daily rate.

$$ \mathit{Result} = \frac{\mathit{Daily\,Feedstock\,Throughput\,(Tons}}{\mathit{Day)}} $$
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI is utilized in performance monitoring
  • operational efficiency assessments
  • and production planning within the oil
  • gas
  • and petrochemical sectors
Input Measure
  • Total feedstock processed in tons and the number of hours the facility was online
  • Total feedstock processed and the number of operating hours in the measurement period
Unit of Measure tons/day
Reporting Source Data is typically sourced from production logs and operational reports generated by the facility.
Comments A zero value for hours online will result in a throughput of zero, indicating that no feedstock was processed during that period.

Code Context

1:emphasize-lines: 1
